scripts.prepare: mkdir -p node_modules/react-devtools-core && echo '{"name":"react-devtools-core","version":"0.0.0","main":"index.js","type":"module"}' > node_modules/react-devtools-core/package.json && echo 'export default { initialize(){}, connectToDevTools(){} };' > node_modules/react-devtools-core/index.js
scripts.build: bun run prepare && bun build --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64 src/cli.ts --outfile dist/arrstack-linux-x64
scripts.build:arm64: bun run prepare && bun build --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/cli.ts --outfile dist/arrstack-linux-arm64
